---

Great sales people view problem customers. You know the customer I'm talking about? Wanker, Willie, okay? The whack job, okay? They're tough, they're unbelievable, you can't satisfy them. They see these customers as opportunities to create fans. Because for every screaming customer that you've ever had, look when they start screaming the other way, how good you are, how great you are, how incredible. Look problems become bank, they become money, they become like raving maniac fanatic customers, fans of yours forever. So the great snow, man, if I could just just flip this switch, get this guy from complaining to raving, that'll be a big asset for my company.
